archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) blended with Archetype 2 (Performance Pro)
emotional_tone: High-tech, authoritative, precise, neural command center

typography.headings: font-heading (Chivo) - tracking-tight, uppercase for module headers
typography.body: font-body (IBM Plex Sans) - clear, highly readable
typography.data_and_code: font-mono (IBM Plex Mono) - for timers, confidence scores, logs, and stats

layout.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid - Dense, functional, edge-to-edge bento layout with 1px structural borders.
layout.spacing: gap-1 for technical precision (creating a seamless grid), internal padding p-4 to p-6 for widgets.
layout.container: min-h-screen bg-background text-foreground overflow-hidden flex flex-col
layout.grid_structure: grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 h-full flex-1 p-4

motion.data_stream: framer-motion to simulate data flow from Hippocampus to Neo Cortex

video_stage.description: Main VAR video feed area with targeting reticles, confidence overlay, and playback controls.
video_stage.styles: relative w-full aspect-video bg-black border border-border flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden

brain_pathway.description: Visualization showing Hippocampus (Fast context) feeding into Neo Cortex (Deep analysis).
brain_pathway.styles: h-32 w-full bg-card/50 border border-border/40 flex items-center justify-between p-4 relative

confidence_meter.description: Large mono-font percentage display with color coding based on threshold (e.g., >90% Green, <70% Red).

decision_actions.styles: h-16 text-lg font-heading tracking-widest uppercase rounded-none border border-transparent hover:border-current

incident_timeline.description: Vertical timeline of match events with active focus on the current VAR check.
incident_timeline.styles: flex flex-col gap-2 relative pl-4 border-l border-border/30

websocket_indicator.description: Blinking green dot with 'LIVE SYNC' text.
websocket_indicator.styles: flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-mono text-primary

images.description: Abstract neural network/circuit board to use as a faint background in the Brain Pathway visual.
images.usage: background-image for the Brain Pathway visualization widget, with heavy black overlay.
Use as a background overlay for the spatial mapping/player positioning widget.
Placeholder for the Live VAR Video Feed.

assets.icons: lucide-react (e.g., Activity, Brain, ShieldAlert, Cpu, Video, CheckCircle, XCircle)

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Control Room' grid archetype. The dashboard must feel dense, edge-to-edge, and highly technical.
Use framer-motion or CSS animations for the 'Brain Pathway' to show data pulses moving between nodes.
Implement the UI using raw Tailwind+HTML for the major layout structural elements to ensure precise borders and overlays.
Use pure CSS/Tailwind grid. A 12-column subgrid layout is highly recommended.
Do not use generic 'Card' with rounded corners and soft shadows. Use sharp, 0px or 2px radius borders (border-border/40) for widgets.
Always use the chosen media URLs exactly as provided. Do not use generic placeholders like via.placeholder.com.
Incorporate the required 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='confirm-decision-btn').
